author: y4rr
content: [result] Replaced raw_device_ptr usize hack with proper typed pointers. raw_device_ptr now returns *const c_void, raw_device_ptr_mut returns *mut c_void. Added buffer_elem_size() method to GpuBackend trait (returns 4 for f32, 8 for f64). NCCL collectives now auto-detect dtype via buffer_elem_size — nccl_allreduce/broadcast/all_gather/reduce_scatter work correctly for both f32 and f64 without explicit _dtype calls. 3271 tests pass.
